title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama project—CLI and Go library for pulling and running Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other GGUF models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that wraps Ollama for local LLM chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; supports multi-model chats, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive REPL with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma in 50 lines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducible Ollama installations on macOS and Linux with GPU drivers.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger pipeline module that spins up an Ollama sidecar for CI-based LLM unit tests.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde types.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 SDK for Ollama with chat, embeddings, and vision support; includes a Blazor demo.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels via mentions or slash commands.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit component that wraps Ollama for quick internal LLM playgrounds with chat UI and parameter sliders.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to deploy Ollama on AWS EC2 with NVIDIA GPU autoscaling and EFS model cache.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama chat & embed endpoints for interoperable AI agents.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: Utility to convert Hugging Face transformers models to GGUF and push them directly into Ollama’s model library.
